Stop memorizing formulas. Start seeing how science works.

introduce.title: What is Scivra?
introduce.label: About
introduce.description: An interactive science learning platform with 3D simulations covering Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Earth Science, and Math — from K-2 through AP level.

items.title: 64 Interactive Experiments
items.description: Hands-on 3D simulations across 5 subjects. Adjust parameters and see results instantly.

items.title: K-12 + AP Coverage
items.description: From elementary science to AP Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. Aligned with NGSS, GCSE, and AP standards.

items.title: Progress Tracking

items.title: Privacy-First
items.description: GDPR and COPPA compliant. Student data is protected with age-appropriate safeguards.

benefits.title: Why Scivra?
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Built for students, teachers, and curious minds who want to experience physics, not just read about it.

items.title: Learn by Doing

items.title: Built-in Challenges

items.title: Works Everywhere

testimonials.title: Students Who Stopped Dreading Science
testimonials.description: Real stories from students, parents, and teachers.

items.name: Aiden M.
items.quote: I went from a C to an A- in AP Physics. The projectile motion sim made everything click — I could literally see why the equations work.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: My teacher showed us PhET, but Scivra's experiments are way more visual. I actually look forward to studying chemistry now.

items.name: Marcus J.
items.quote: I'm not a science person. But when I could play with gravity and orbits in 3D, something switched. I get it now.

items.name: Sophie L.
items.quote: The DNA helix experiment helped me score a 5 on my AP Bio exam. Being able to rotate and zoom into the structure made memorization unnecessary.

items.name: Jennifer T.
items.quote: My son used to fight me on homework. Now he opens Scivra on his own. $4.99/month for that kind of attitude change? Best money I've spent.

items.name: Mr. David Chen
items.quote: I assign Scivra experiments as pre-lab work. My students come to class already understanding the concepts — that never happened with textbooks.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Quick answers for parents, students, and teachers.
faq.tip: Still have questions? Email us at support@scivra.com

items.question: Is Scivra free?
items.answer: Yes. Free-tier users get access to select experiments every day. Pro ($4.99/mo) and Max plans unlock all 64 experiments with unlimited time.

items.question: What subjects and grade levels are covered?
items.answer: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Earth Science, and Math — from K-2 through AP level. Every experiment is aligned with NGSS, GCSE, or AP standards.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. Scivra runs in any modern browser on desktop, tablet, or phone. No downloads, plugins, or special hardware.

items.question: Is student data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. We are GDPR and COPPA compliant with age-gating, consent management, and the ability to export or delete personal data on request.
